description: Look up startups across SEC Form D, GitHub, Hacker News, Companies House, YC, Wikidata, and DNS in one command. Built for scouts, founders, BD, and AI agents researching small/midsize startups.

tools.name: filings_list
tools.description: Fetch all SEC submissions for a given CIK (Central Index Key). Used as the seed call when resolving a company's...

params.name: cik
params.description: 10-digit zero-padded SEC Central Index Key (e.g., 0001318605 for Tesla)
